mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate raises the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals an impending economic contraction, triggering risk-off equity selling and negative forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold being breached.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in housing starts and nonfarm payrolls confirms broad-based demand expansion, supporting corporate earnings and driving positive forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative Rank IC or forward returns do not exceed baseline by >1.5% over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation exceeds 2.5 percent year-over-year, the Federal Reserve enforces hawkish policy that tightens financial conditions and suppresses equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when inflation triggers the signal and Fed funds rise, or Rank IC exceeds 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing output and capacity utilization, directly boosting corporate revenues and generating positive short-term forward returns.
failure_condition: Rolling 1-year Spearman correlation between INDPRO changes and 5d SPX returns is below 0.1.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in retail sales indicates weakening consumer spending, which reduces earnings expectations and drives negative forward equity returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when retail sales drop by the specified threshold over a 12-month test.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrently rising nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rate confirm a strengthening labor market, which supports wage growth and consumer demand, driving positive forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to produce a positive Rank IC over any 2-year window, or forward returns are flat.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP growth exceeds 3.0 percent annualized alongside rising housing starts, the economy exhibits robust expansionary momentum that lifts equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative when both GDP growth and housing starts exceed their thresholds over a 3-year test.
